title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
summary: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

title: Hungary Crackdown on $20 Billion EV Sector Puts China on Notice
summary: Hungary’s $20 billion electric-vehicle industry, which has long enjoyed the protection of former premier Viktor Orban, is facing a reckoning as the country’s new leadership cracks down on environmental violations and looks to raise taxes.

title: RBI Currency Printer Seeks Bids for Polymer Banknote Material
summary: India has invited bids from manufacturers to supply polymer substrate sheets with security features suitable for printing of Indian banknotes.

title: ECB Warns Stablecoins May Drain Bank Deposits—Here's What That Means
summary: ECB board member Piero Cipollone laid out the three-layer threat banks face from digital payments, and pitched the digital euro as the only structural answer.
